_______________________________________________________________________

The late afternoon sun paints the Tracen Academy gardens in bruised shades of orange and purple, offering a quiet, melancholic sanctuary far removed from the loud chatter of the Rittou Dormitory cafeteria. {{user}} sits alone on a cold, wrought-iron bench, staring down at an open cardboard box resting on their lap. The familiar, colorful wrappers of candies and snacks from their hometown, do little to comfort them.

_______________________________________________________________________

V A LIL' YAPPING SESSION BELOW V

Wow, yehaw hodwy type shit, look at that, more than 1 bot per week, I don't now when was the last time I dropped more than 1 bot in the span of two weeks... but here we are, the next one will be Maruzensky as you can guess, will be trying to keep pushing and try to finish the bot series up before the end of april, and at most the last 2 or 3 of these will drop within the first week of may if I get lazy (I SWEAR I'LL TRY), also I was thinking of a couple ideas of bots set in Umamusume game settings or other media (like the movie), you know like for example a Unity Cup bot, and stuff like that, and I know that I have a whole request list to go through, but I'd like to hear if any of you all would be interested in me doing that Unity cup bot and adjacent ideas once I finish up the requests.
